notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Will Warren. Max Muncy scores. Jeff McNeil to 3rd. Carlos Cortes to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Soderstrom reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Ben Rice. Tyler Soderstrom to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Darell Hernaiz pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Darell Hernaiz singles on a ground ball to third baseman Amed Rosario.

notableEvents.label: Brent Rooker reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Brent Rooker reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Amed Rosario.

notableEvents.label: Aaron Judge GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Ryan McMahon out at 2nd. Aaron Judge out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan McMahon GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan McMahon grounds into a double play, shortstop Jacob Wilson to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Amed Rosario out at 2nd. Ryan McMahon out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan McMahon rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan McMahon grounds into a double play, shortstop Jacob Wilson to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Amed Rosario out at 2nd. Ryan McMahon out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Soderstrom reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Ben Rice. Tyler Soderstrom to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Brent Rooker reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Amed Rosario.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Brent Rooker reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Amed Rosario.
